Video.summary: A Georgia couple clashes in court over an ultimatum to marry or move on.
Video.title: Billingsley vs. Perrilloux

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: A woman sues her boyfriend after he tore her dress saying it was too revealing.
Video.title: Edmonds vs. Steele

Video.summary: The mysterious disappearance of a prized Steelers jersey has Michelle and Ken's 23-year relationship on the line.
Video.title: Lozon vs. Lozon

Video.summary: Is James splitting hairs with Carle over his bad hair day or is there just a hair more about this case?
Video.title: Splitting Hairs

Video.summary: Shaneequa loved her precious pooch but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could.
Video.title: Screwing the Pooch

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.
Video.title: Lopez vs. Widmer

Video.summary: After an incident involving the police and damage to her car, LaShawn grapples with her ex-boyfriend Mario's militant personality.
Video.title: Brown vs. Monk

Video.summary: A young couple battle over responsibility and paternity, with shocking truths waiting to be revealed in court.
Video.title: Caldwell-Roach vs. Roach

Video.summary: A woman is prepared to walk away from her boyfriend, the father of her unborn child, because of his party lifestyle.
Video.title: Smith vs. Lamisere

Video.summary: When addiction leads to a family tragedy, the Butlers turn to the judges to learn how to work through their marital issues.
Video.title: Butler vs Butler

Video.summary: A New Jersey woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property exchange of her beloved cat.
Video.title: Monsanto vs. Eskander

Video.summary: Dolly Parton impersonator Charlene is suing her cousin over a loan. Tiffany says she never wanted repayment.
Video.title: Hello Dolly

Video.summary: Yuri she said Bryan promised her a big bucks photobook, but when her it failed, their party petered out.
Video.title: The Party is Over

Video.summary: Once beer buddies, these former friends feud over a miscommunication that led to a botched beer run and a wrecked car.
Video.title: The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!

Image.alt: The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!
The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!
The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!

Video.summary: Carol is suing her husband for using her money for a bachelor party. Marion argues it was a joint account.
Video.title: The Wedding Thief

Video.summary: After four years of hookups, Deja is ready to determine her compatibility with Onika and decide if she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Lackely vs. Rivera

Video.summary: Former roommates and ex-lovers, Shelby and Natalie, settle a dispute over unpaid rent money.
Video.title: Hannan vs. Davila

Video.summary: An exhausted mother gets a surprise after putting her dreams on hold for her family.
Video.title: Prince vs. Thornton

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Pablo’s got jokes, but Joanna isn’t laughing. They bring their issues to the Cutlers for help saving their marriage.
Video.title: Aleman vs Aleman

Video.summary: A Georgia couple seek advice from the judges after struggling with nitpicking, job loss and starting a family.
Video.title: King vs. McFee

Video.summary: After a beach getaway raises suspicions, LaBre must convince her husband, Taj, that he is the father of their son.
Video.title: Sewell vs. Sewell

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: A car sale between coworkers started off sour turned bitter and ended with a sweet old lady.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Rosa says that Michael took her TV to repair and never brought it back and now she wants her money.
Video.title: Please Stand By

Video.summary: This car-crazy sister claims she was scammed by her big brother's bogus paint job, and wants her money back.
Video.title: The Big Bro Botch

Video.summary: Jillian is suing her former landlord for rent, claiming they were perfect tenants. Their landlord, Stephen, claims they partied nonstop and caused damage to the home and surrounding property.
Video.title: Terrible Tenant or Low-Down Landlord?

Video.summary: A woman sues a former friend after bailing him out of jail.
Video.title: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Image.alt: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Video.summary: Delvon's suing for wifi costs and alienation of affection. Tedmenia says she's just chatting online!
Video.title: Anti-Social Network

Video.summary: Jasmine and Drayson are suing each other over a security deposit due a flea infestation.
Video.title: Welcome to the Flea Circus

Video.summary: Candace is suing a used car salesman for a car she never kept. He claims that he offered her 15 cars.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Johnny is suing his former friend for costs stemming from a botched dog-sitting deal.
Video.title: Sin and Tonic

Video.summary: Tyra is accusing her best friend of allowing her car to be towed and junked due to a parking ticket dispute.
Video.title: Parking Tickets Destroy a Friendship

Video.summary: Marie Lavin says she was walking her dog when the defendant’s pit bull got loose and mauled her dog. Now, five months later, she’s having on heck of a time getting him to pay the vet bills and is suing for $1,848. The defendant, Peter Martin Connolly, says the plaintiff’s dog was the aggressor, came over to his fence, and started attacking his dog which was on his property. His dog, a bulldog, not a pit bull, was just defending himself in his own yard. He’s accused of doing some doggie damage.
Video.title: Doggie Damage

Video.summary: Russell King claims Rasheeda Brown owes him $3,000 for painting her house, despite doing an excellent job. Rasheeda argues he brought his son to work with heavy machinery, acted inappropriately, and left the job incomplete.
Video.title: Painting Disaster

Video.summary: Samantha sues her ex, Matthew, for $500 or the return of their dog, Daisy, claiming he's aggressive and unfit to care for her. Matthew counters, insisting Daisy is his since he saved her from the pound.
Video.title: Exes at War

Video.summary: Malika Jules claims Shamika Chambers' son broke her iPad at her salon, costing $385 to replace. Shamika denies responsibility, saying all kids were playing together, and insists there's no proof her son caused the damage.
Video.title: Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad

Image.alt: Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad
Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad
Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad

Video.summary: Raven says her friend started hooking up with her ex while they were in Las Vegas, so she's suing for the trip
Video.title: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Image.alt: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Video.summary: A woman accuses her cousin of crashing her car with the plaintiff's children inside.
Video.title: Mathis Take the Wheel

Video.summary: Mikaela is suing her hair dresser after she left mid-service for a DUI class, and now her hair is falling out.
Video.title: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Image.alt: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Video.summary: Eleanor believes that the defendant may be the daughter of her brother, who has been deceased for 18 years.
Video.title: Trying to Make It Official

Video.summary: A woman says the defendant began cheating on her after she got pregnant with his child; she sues him for unpaid child support; the defendant claims he has fallen on hard times since the pandemic.
Video.title: Broken Promises, Unpaid Dues

Video.summary: A man sues his ex-fiance for unreturned property and an engagement ring; she says she left him because he's a raging alcoholic and drug addict.
Video.title: Ring Wraiths

Video.summary: Tajanea is suing her ex-boyfriend for over $2,000 after she claimed he damaged her car and apartment.
Video.title: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Image.alt: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Video.summary: Jorge brings his wife to court for damaged property after constantly accusing him of cheating.
Video.title: Done with the Accusations
